name: ScrollBreak
description: ScrollBreak is a mobile app that fights doomscrolling by monitoring scrolling behavior, showing real-time usage insights, and sending smart break reminders so users can build healthier digital habits.

name: Study Vibe Matchmaker
description: Study Vibe Matchmaker creates a personalized study session from your mood, subject, and time with music, breaks, technique, and motivation.

name: Mnemosyne
description: Secure AI memory: Empowering intelligent insights while safeguarding data privacy through automated redaction and enterprise-grade hardening.

name: DigiBridge
description: Digital Bridge lets older adults speak any web request, booking, refills, bills, and our AI completes it automatically. No forms. No confusion. Just voice

name: HireMachine
description: A persistent AI identity layer that writes, applies, and communicates across the web

name: Rocket-Simulator
description: An AI-powered system that turns natural language into fully simulated rocket designs.

name: TeamConnect
description: It is a gamified HR platform designed to boost team engagement, recognition, and motivation through fun activities, rewards, and peer appreciation.
